transcript: Speaker A: Kya matlab ki tumhein job karni hai? Job mein sabse English mein baat karni padti hai, woh bhi confidently. Tumhein pata hai kitna mushkil hai? [What do you mean you want to do a job? In a job, you have to talk to everyone in English, and that too confidently. Do you know how difficult it is?] Speaker B: For your information, I can speak English fluently and confidently. I don't need any help in understanding anything. I used to be topper in my school, and I can contribute better to my family with a job. Speaker A: Arre, tumne itni acchi English kaise seekhi? [Wow, how did you learn such good English?] Speaker B: Maine SpeakX app download kiya hai. Iske AI teacher ke saath jab tum office jaate the, tab main practice karti thi. Aur do hafte mein meri English ekdum first class ho gayi hai. Ab main kahin bhi English mein baat kar sakti hoon. [I downloaded the SpeakX app. When you went to the office, I used to practice with its AI teacher. And in two weeks, my English became absolutely first-class. Now I can speak in English anywhere.] Speaker A: AI? Kitne paise kharch hue ispe? [AI? How much money did you spend on this?] Speaker B: Ek cup chai se bhi kam. [Less than a cup of tea.] Speaker A: Kya baat kar rahi ho! Phir toh main aaj hi se try karunga. Mujhe bhi office mein English kaam aayegi. Kab tak ek hi salary pe rahunga. [What are you saying! Then I will try it from today itself. English will be useful for me in the office too. How long will I stay on the same salary.] Speaker B: Kya aap bhi meri tarah sabko chaukana chahte hain? Toh aaj hi SpeakX install karo aur do hafte mein farratedar English bolo. [Do you also want to surprise everyone like me? Then install SpeakX today and speak fluent English in two weeks.]
on_screen_text: हिंदी मीडियम से भी जल्दी फ्लूएंट इंग्लिश सिर्फ SpeakX के साथ [Fluent English faster than Hindi medium, only with SpeakX]
summary: A husband doubts his wife's job prospects due to English requirements, but she surprises him with her fluency. She reveals she learned using the SpeakX app's AI teacher for less than the cost of a cup of tea. The ad encourages viewers to download SpeakX to speak fluent English in two weeks.
